memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-06-22 Midday — Key Lessons

1. **Price moves invalidate prior scores.** INTC scored 7.17 at $130. At $139.45 (+7.3%), fresh 6-agent drops to 6.50 (BofA PT $135 now below entry). Never execute a watchlist entry at a stale price without re-scoring. The score belongs to the price.
2. **Stale GTCs are compounding liability.** AMD double-fill risk (18sh if both stale GTCs + new order execute) is the reason AMD was skipped again today. One uncancelled GTC is blocking a valid trade for the 19th+ day. Operator action is the only fix.
3. **Inclusion day ≠ guaranteed spike.** MRVL on S&P 500 inclusion day (June 22) is trading BELOW its pre-inclusion close ($310.58 → $308-$314 midday). Buy-the-rumor, sell-the-news partially in play. ETF forced buying at close is still real but the premium was partially frontrun.
4. **Benchmark gap improvement via market pullback is misleading.** Gap improved from -5.71 pp to -3.78 pp not from our alpha but from SPX declining from ~7,600 post-FOMC estimate to 7,461 actual. We need POSITIVE alpha from actual trades, not passive gap improvement from market weakness.

### 2026-06-12 Daily Review (preserved)

1. **Fresh scoring at new price level.** INTC was MANDATORY at $106 (June 10). After +16% gap to $123, fresh 6-agent run correctly (7.33 — still approved).
2. **LMT thesis inversion recognized immediately.** Iran deal flipped defense from bullish to bearish within 24h. Score correctly fell 7.33 → 5.5.
3. **PPI condition enforced despite MU +11.66% temptation.** Skip held firm on failed macro condition.
